description: Sarcastic complaints about overloaded meeting culture. The midnight call and 6 AM Saturday sync are sarcastic exaggerations, not real scheduling intent.

mock_llm_response.summary: No actionable calendar events found. The midnight status call and 6 AM Saturday sync are clearly sarcastic exaggerations used to express frustration with meeting culture, not genuine scheduling requests.

notes: Sarcastic scheduling suggestions embedded in work-complaint dialogue. The absurd times (midnight, 6 AM Saturday) and sarcastic tone indicate zero real scheduling intent.
